<!-- QUICK OVERVIEW -->
<h2 align="center">🧭 AIvan at a glance</h2>

<p align="center">
  <b>Personal brand + enterprise delivery.</b><br/>
  Building secure, high-performance automations, AI systems, and polished digital experiences with the <b>AIvan way</b>.
</p>

<table align="center">
<tr>
<td align="left" width="280">

### 🎯 Audience priority
1. **Consulting clients** (primary)<br/>
2. **Technical collaborators**<br/>
3. **Recruiters**

</td>
<td align="left" width="280">

### 📈 Proof by numbers
- **10+ years** of experience
- **19 repositories**
- **14 contributed repositories**
- **202 PRs opened**
- **282 commits** (latest metrics snapshot)

</td>
<td align="left" width="280">

### 🧱 Operating principles
- Security-first architecture
- Performance and optimization by default
- Clean, maintainable systems
- Distinctive visuals & motion design

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<p align="center">

</p>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<h2 align="center">⚡ About me</h2>

<div align="center">

<table>
<tr>

<td align="left" width="420">

### 💻 Developer
- Automations Team Lead at a Fortune 500 company
- Full-Stack .NET Developer with enterprise experience
- Building systems that replace manual work with code

</td>

<td align="left" width="420">

### 🤖 AI Tinkerer
- Training LLMs and fine-tuning LoRAs
- Building AI-powered automation workflows
- VibeCoding — the AIvan way

</td>

</tr>

<tr>

<td align="left" width="420">

### 🛠️ Engineering
- Specialized in .NET, Azure, Lua, and enterprise automation
- Clean architecture, testing, and reliability first
- If it's repetitive, it gets automated

</td>

<td align="left" width="420">

### 🧠 Mindset
- Workaholic by choice — work is my escape
- Obsessed with technology, learning, and researching
- Business & Technical Consulting on the side

</td>

</tr>
</table>

</div>

<h4 align="center">🎲 Hobbies</h4>
<p align="center">
💼 Consulting · 🤖 LLM Training · 🧬 LoRA Fine-tuning · 💻 VibeCoding · 🎨 Painting · ✍️ Writing · 📚 Reading · 📺 Series & Movies
</p>

<!-- AI PHILOSOPHY -->
<h2 align="center">🔐 AI Philosophy</h2>

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?font=JetBrains+Mono&pause=1000&center=true&vCenter=true&width=820&color=0077B6&lines=Local+models%2C+local+training%2C+local+control+%E2%80%94+no+exceptions;Your+AI+should+work+for+you%2C+not+the+other+way+around;One+orchestrator+to+rule+them+all;Building+AI+personas+that+think+like+real+humans" />
</p>

<div align="center">

<table>
<tr>

<td align="left" width="420">

### 🏠 Local-First Approach
- All critical training, fine-tuning, and model work done locally
- Avoids OpenAI/Anthropic for critical workflows — uses them as tools, not dependencies
- Full control over data, weights, and outputs

</td>

<td align="left" width="420">

### 🔓 Breaking AI Barriers
- AIs are designed to impress, upsell, and keep you using them without solving real problems
- Working hard to make things actually produce proper, working code
- Building skills to cut through the marketing and get real results

</td>

</tr>

<tr>

<td align="left" width="420">

### 🎯 AI Orchestration Architecture
- Multi-instance LLM orchestration with a GitHub-style lock system
- One main orchestrator acting as the "boss" delegating tasks
- Summaries, local memory, update files for persistent context across sessions
- Setting guidelines, best practices, and review cycles

</td>

<td align="left" width="420">

### 🎭 AI Persona Research
- Building AI personas based on real human examples
- Goal: explore how far we can go replicating human behavior, thinking, and thought patterns
- Local MCPs, empowered LLMs with proper system engineering

</td>

</tr>
</table>

</div>

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://capsule-render.vercel.app/api?type=rect&color=0:00B4D8,100:0077B6&height=3" />
</p>

</p>

<!-- CURRENT -->
<h2 align="center">🌍 Currently building (private)</h2>

<p align="center">
  Momo has been retired, and active development is now fully focused on <b>AIvan</b>.
</p>

<table align="center">
<tr>
<td align="left" width="860">

### 🤖 AIvan
Unified personal brand + MVP platform for private R&D, premium user experiences, and secure product incubation.<br/>
**Focus:** high security, top-tier performance, unique animations/visuals, hidden content, and patent-aligned innovation workflows.

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<h3 align="center">🖼️ Project snapshots</h3>
<p align="center">
  Public demo assets and case-study snippets for AIvan are being prepared and will be added here.
</p>

<!-- FUN FACTS -->
<h2 align="center">💡 Fun facts</h2>

<p align="center">
  <i>Because life isn't all code... mostly, though.</i>
</p>

<p align="center">
☕ Haven't touched coffee in 2+ years — survived a coffee tasting, loved every sip, still didn't go back<br/>
🎨 When I'm not coding, I'm painting — creativity isn't just for IDEs<br/>
🚀 Started freelancing while still in school — 10+ years later, still can't stop building<br/>
🤖 Trained my first LoRA out of spite because an AI couldn't do what I needed<br/>
📺 If there's a good series, it's getting binged — no exceptions<br/>
🧠 I read AI research papers for fun — yes, on weekends too
</p>
